premise.description: The premise this story is built on (1-2 sentences)

timing_mode.description: intent_first = mute-first; durations from beat intent. audio_first = from VO timestamps. scene_first = from action. music_first = from beat.

visual_first_frame.description: Description of the very first frame (mute viewers see this)

onscreen_text.description: Caption text overlay, 4-7 words, present tense, high-contrast. PRIMARY hook for mute viewers.

vo_line.description: VO line (supplementary, for unmuted viewers). Optional.

duration_sec.description: Hook duration in seconds. 3.0 typical for short-form.

narasi_vo.description: VO narration for this beat (audio layer)

visual_concept.description: Visual concept driving this beat (mute layer, primary)

onscreen_text_caption.description: Sticky caption for mute readers. Optional.

duration_sec_target.description: Target duration in seconds, from BEAT INTENT not VO length

loop.description: Does the video loop back to opening?

curiosity_gaps.description: List of unanswered questions seeded throughout video
